description: Martin Turner is a senior executive with 18 years extensive experience operating at board level in a variety of roles with complex FTSE 100 organisations in the UK and internationally. He has an excellent track record of successfully leading transformational business and organisational change. Martin’s current role is Group Business Risk Director for Lloyds Banking Group. This includes accountability for significant Group wide projects and the Risk Chief Operating Office. His previous roles in Lloyds and Barclays covered integration, compliance and operational risk, IT and operations, servicing and transformation, strategy and planning and change. He has previous experience in a number of project management roles and frontline retail and commercial roles in the UK and Africa.

details.body:
Martin Turner is a senior executive with 18 years extensive experience operating at board level in a variety of roles with complex FTSE 100 organisations in the UK and internationally. He has an excellent track record of successfully leading transformational business and organisational change.

Martin’s current role is Group Business Risk Director for Lloyds Banking Group. This includes accountability for significant Group wide projects and the Risk Chief Operating Office.

His previous roles in Lloyds and Barclays covered integration, compliance and operational risk, IT and operations, servicing and transformation, strategy and planning and change. He has previous experience in a number of project management roles and frontline retail and commercial roles in the UK and Africa.

Commissioners support the Chair in meeting the terms of reference for the Independent Dormant Assets Commission.

title: Martin Turner
